terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1Text: OpenShortner is a free URL shortening service. By using this service, you agree to the terms below.
terms.s2Text: It is strictly prohibited to use the service for:
s2Items: Distribution of malware, phishing or malicious content
Links to illegal content in any jurisdiction
Any activity that violates local, state or federal laws
terms.s3Text: We reserve the right to remove any link or block any account at any time, without prior notice, in case of violation of these terms or for any other reason.
terms.s4Text1: OpenShortner is not responsible for the content of shortened URLs. The service is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
terms.s4Text2: We are not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of the service.
s5Items: IP address for rate limiting purposes
terms.s5Extra: We do not share personal data with third parties.
terms.s6Text: These terms may be changed at any time. Continued use of the service after changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s7Text: For questions or reports, open an issue on the
